title: Skies the Limit
description: Skies the Limit is a Create-focused modpack centered on aerial engineering and dramatic exploration. With Valkyrien Skies, Valkyrien Sails, VS Eureka, Ice and Fire, and Distant Horizons,
body: Skies the Limit is a Create-focused modpack centered on aerial engineering and dramatic exploration. With Valkyrien Skies, Valkyrien Sails, VS Eureka, Ice and Fire, and Distant Horizons, the world features continental, high-mountain terrain and towering peaks that push into the clouds. Performance mods keep large builds and expansive horizons smooth while RPG and exploration systems reward discovery and danger.
